title: bunni cd
description: A beautiful white resource pack with a transparent UI. Made for Crystal PvP
body:
![Showcase of the resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd4e2fe566bc0797e7a4e18a681111d1db1319ee.jpeg)
### **THIS RESOURCE PACK FEATURES**
- Clean GUI: The interfaces elements such as inventory, hotbar, and menus feature a transparent, clean GUI, allowing players to know whats going on the world around them while maintaining all of the functionality of the original GUI.

- Black & White theme: The resource pack features a clean, balanced blen of black and white tones for some in-game items/entities, creating a high-contrast, visually appealing experience that suits both light and dark gameplay environments. This black and white theme gives the game a more sleek, polished and modern look.

Join the [discord](https://discord.gg/A94MBY88bU)
